title: ilex rupicola
intro: Ilex rupicola, also known as the rock holly or rocky holly, is a species of holly native to the mountainous regions of Central and South America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as a diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Ilex rupicola include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory problems, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, as well as being used in the form of tinctures or capsules, making it a versatile and accessible remedy.
